testcase.name: duplicateSubmission_shouldReturnSameWorkflow
testcase.system-out:
Standard Commons Logging discovery in action with spring-jcl: please remove commons-logging.jar from classpath in order to avoid potential conflicts 14:08:47.878 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.ar.reconciliation.WorkflowIntegrationTest]: WorkflowIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 14:08:47.921 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.ar.reconciliation.ARReconciliationApplication for test class com.ar.reconciliation.WorkflowIntegrationTest 14:08:47.974 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.images.PullPolicy -- Image pull policy will be performed by: DefaultPullPolicy() 14:08:47.975 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.utility.ImageNameSubstitutor -- Image name substitution will be performed by: DefaultImageNameSubstitutor (composite of 'ConfigurationFileImageNameSubstitutor' and 'PrefixingImageNameSubstitutor') 14:08:48.056 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.dockerclient.DockerClientProviderStrategy -- Loaded org.testcontainers.dockerclient.UnixSocketClientProviderStrategy from ~/.testcontainers.properties, will try it first 14:08:48.236 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.dockerclient.DockerClientProviderStrategy -- Found Docker environment with local Unix socket (unix:///var/run/docker.sock) 14:08:48.237 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Docker host IP address is localhost 14:08:48.275 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Connected to docker: Server Version: 5.6.0 API Version: 1.41 Operating System: fedora Total Memory: 5480 MB 14:08:48.315 [main] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.6.0 -- Creating container for image: testcontainers/ryuk:0.6.0 14:08:48.317 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.utility.RegistryAuthLocator -- Failure when attempting to lookup auth config. testcase.name: happyPath_shouldReachCompleted
